query:
SELECT 
  t.name as trilha,
  p.name as programa,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ms.alunoId) as alunos,
  MAX(ms.sessionNumber) as max_sessao
FROM mentoring_sessions ms
JOIN trilhas t ON ms.trilhaId = t.id
JOIN programs p ON t.programId = p.id
GROUP BY t.id, t.name, p.name
ORDER BY t.name

SELECT

  p.name as programa,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ms.alunoId) as alunos,
  MAX(ms.sessionNumber) as max_sessao
FROM mentoring_sessions ms
JOIN trilhas t ON ms.trilhaId = t.id
JOIN programs p ON t.programId = p.id
GROUP BY t.id, t.name, p.name
ORDER BY t.name
